MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

Link text is very long (103 characters)

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (2 avvik)2 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="article__accordion">Papirutgave av Senior i Trondheim</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

https://www.trondheim.kommune.no/org/byutvikling/trondheim-bydrift/henvendelser-til-trondheim-bydrift/

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (3 avvik)3 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="article__accordion">Henvendelser om kommunal veg, kommunale parker, friarealer, turstier og markaområder</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="article__accordion">Henvendelse om feil på vann og avløp</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
2.4.6 Headings and Labels (2 avvik)2 moderat
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (3 avvik)1 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://kart.trondheim.kommune.no/gatelys/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Gatelys">Kart for innmelding av feil på gatelys</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

Byrådet - Trondheim kommune

https://www.trondheim.kommune.no/tema/politikk-og-planer/styrer-rad-og-utvalg/byradsleders-avdeling/
57 alvorlige37 moderate3 mindre

MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Ensure all ID values are unique within the page

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.6 Headings and Labels (2 avvik)2 moderat
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (5 avvik)3 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn icon-pos" href="https://geoinnsyn.no/?application=trondheim&project=finn%20din%20skole&zoom=15&lat=7034666.55&lon=569390.50" rel="noopener" target="_blank">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RyrRggr3vMQPOL93fP8oAJVpWhfNJLsC/view?usp=sharing" rel="noopener" target="_blank">et søknadsskjema</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://lovdata.no/lov/2023-06-09-30/§4-1" rel="noopener" target="_blank">§4-1 i Opplæringslova</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="article__accordion">Skoleåret 2025/2026</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
2.4.6 Headings and Labels (2 avvik)2 moderat
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>
Use a heading that describes the content it introduces
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Heading is not descriptive: 'Innhold'

<h2 class="list-group__title nomenu">Innhold</h2>

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Menu</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (4 avvik)2 moderat2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to main content'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Go to main content</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link link--inherit link--underline" href="https://candidate.webcruiter.com/en-gb/Home/companyadverts?&link_source=0&companylock=7254#search" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="link link--inherit link--underline" href="https://www.ntnu.edu/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"> NTNU </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)2 alvorlig
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_strek'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_strek">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Kommunevåpen_farger'

<g id="Kommunevåpen_farger">
Ensure all ID values are unique within the page
4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

1.3.1 Info and Relationships (1 avvik)1 moderat
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden">Meny</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
2.4.4 Link Purpose (In Context) (2 avvik)2 mindre
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til hovedinnhold'

<a class="accessibility-shortcuts__link" href="#main">Gå til hovedinnhold</a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til toppen'

<a aria-label="Gå til toppen" class="default-footer__go-to-top" href="#default-header">
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

4.1.2 Name, Role, Value (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Redundant role='banner' on

<header class="default-header" id="default-header" role="banner">
Remove role attribute -already has this role implicitly

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

Skriv inn URL-en du vil skanne:

Kopier og kjør denne kommandoen i terminalen:

python checker.py https://www.trondheim.kommune.no --max-pages 20 --format html
